metadata.name: Manage Crowd at a Public Protest

description: A large, unplanned protest is forming. An operator must monitor crowd size and density to ensure public safety.

nodes.task_description: Use camera analytics to monitor the growing crowd at 'City Hall Plaza'.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets real-time estimates of crowd count and density.

nodes.task_description: Set an alert threshold for when crowd density exceeds a safe limit.

expected_outcome.value: Agent configures an alert to trigger if density becomes dangerous.

nodes.task_description: Share the live crowd monitoring dashboard with the police command center.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides police with situational awareness.
